core_metadata: Whole-blood microarray; moderate-to-severe Crohn disease; UNITI-2/Stelara phase 3 induction/maintenance context; week 0, week 6, week 8; 1733 GEO samples; PMID 36109152; DOI 10.1136/gutjnl-2021-326451
uncertainty_manual_review: Same UNITI family as DS047/DS107, but blood vs tissue and no subject crosswalk checked. Do not count independently from UNITI tissue rows until patient IDs are reconciled.

core_metadata: Intestinal biopsy microarray; Crohn disease; adalimumab treatment; 10 patients sampled before and after 3 months; GEO lists 80 samples including technical repeats; citation missing in GEO
uncertainty_manual_review: No current overlap evidence with existing anti-TNF rows. Publication/PMID needs manual confirmation because GEO citation is missing.

core_metadata: Isolated LPMC microarray; Crohn disease anti-TNF responders vs non-responders; 3 responders and 3 non-responders; ongoing anti-TNF therapy; PMID 29848778; DOI 10.1136/gutjnl-2017-315671
uncertainty_manual_review: Small mechanistic anti-TNF cohort, not a named trial. Count as independent unless future source review links it to another Erlangen anti-TNF accession.

core_metadata: SubSeries RNA-seq; sorted T-cell transcriptomes from colon biopsies; vedolizumab-treated IBD cases vs matched controls; GSE234981 has 346 samples; SuperSeries GSE234982 has 442 samples; PMID 37837660; DOI 10.1093/ibd/izac151
countability: count_as_independent_cohort=Unclear if subseries only; prefer SuperSeries-level row if representing full study
uncertainty_manual_review: Do not add GSE234981 alone without deciding whether GSE234982 should be the primary row. GSE234981 is a component/subseries.

core_metadata: PBMC single-cell RNA-seq; UC vedolizumab responders/non-responders and healthy controls; 10 UC patients at week 0 and week 6 plus 5 controls; 29 GEO samples; PMID 39343250; DOI 10.1053/j.gastro.2024.09.021
uncertainty_manual_review: GEO notes missing raw files due to patient privacy; processed availability and exact usable matrices should be checked before analysis-ready status.

core_metadata: CITE-seq / single-cell transcriptomics with surface proteins; peripheral blood and colon immune cells from UC patients treated with vedolizumab; GEO lists 54 samples; PMID 37235748; DOI 10.1093/ibd/izad084
uncertainty_manual_review: Likely independent UCSD/Takeda-supported vedolizumab cohort. Manual review should verify exact subject count and whether blood/colon samples are paired before summarizing subjects.
